meaning: n.丑行,丑闻,诽谤,耻辱,流言蜚语
examples: The press could scent a scandal.
Tabloid newspapers love to dig up scandal.
The scandal took a new turn over the weekend.
The Redfern inquiry report said "managerial inadequacy" had been a factor in the scandal.
At the heart of the scandal are market interest rates called Libor and Euribor.
